description: The venue's security operator needs to monitor surveillance cameras to identify any potential overcrowding in the stadium's concourses.

nodes.task_description: Access the live feeds from all surveillance cameras in the stadium.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent is viewing the live camera feeds on a dashboard.

nodes.task_description: Use an AI-powered video analytics tool to automatically detect crowd density.

expected_outcome.expected: The tool flags a specific concourse area as having high crowd density.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch security and event staff to the flagged area to help manage the crowd flow.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends staff to the location to prevent a safety issue.
